column3: Medtronic Inc is the SEC issuer of ticker MDT, own-name match
Optum Public Sector Solutions is a subsidiary of UnitedHealth Group (UNH), confirmed via Optum Business federal-govt org pages
Medtronic USA Inc is a direct operating subsidiary of Medtronic Inc, ticker MDT
STERIS Corporation is the operating subsidiary of STERIS plc, SEC issuer of ticker STE
MHN Government Services is part of Health Net Federal Services, a wholly-owned Centene (CNC) subsidiary per Centene investor press release
Rome Research Corp was sold by PAR Technology to NexTech Solutions, closed July 1 2024; parent link to PAR (PAR) is stale per PAR/NexTech press releases
L3Harris Technologies is the SEC issuer itself (ticker LHX); ITT sold its Exelis defense unit to Harris in 2015, so ITT is not the current parent/issuer
Stryker Corporation is the SEC issuer of ticker SYK, own-name match
Huntsman International LLC is the primary operating subsidiary of Huntsman Corporation, ticker HUN
Fluor Enterprises Inc is a wholly-owned operating subsidiary of Fluor Corporation, ticker FLR
Praxair Inc became indirect wholly-owned subsidiary of Linde plc (LIN) via 2018 SEC-documented merger
Change Healthcare was acquired by Optum/UnitedHealth Group (UNH) in 2022; McKesson (MCK) parent listing is stale
ProVation Software was acquired by Fortive Corp (FTV) from Clearlake Capital, closed Dec 27 2021 per Fortive press release
Filmetrics Inc is a wholly-owned subsidiary of KLA Corporation, ticker KLAC
Comcast Cable Communications LLC is the core operating subsidiary of Comcast Corporation, ticker CMCSA
Grifols USA LLC is the US operating subsidiary of Grifols S.A., ADR ticker GRFS
McKesson Medical-Surgical Inc is a wholly-owned operating subsidiary of McKesson Corporation, ticker MCK
Fluor Enterprises Inc is a wholly-owned operating subsidiary of Fluor Corporation, ticker FLR
RTX Corporation is the SEC issuer of ticker RTX, own-name match
Stryker Sales LLC is a wholly-owned operating subsidiary of Stryker Corporation, ticker SYK
American Systems Corporation is an unrelated privately-held IT services firm; AIG ticker belongs to American International Group, no corporate link
Stryker Sales LLC is a wholly-owned operating subsidiary of Stryker Corporation, ticker SYK
Linde Advanced Material Technologies is part of the Linde plc (LIN) corporate family per Linde/Praxair SEC merger filings
Linde Engineering North America LLC operates under Linde plc (LIN), consistent with Linde North America Inc corporate structure post-2018 merger
Azenta US Inc is the operating subsidiary of Azenta Inc, renamed from Brooks Automation to ticker AZTA in Dec 2021
Howmedica Osteonics acquired by Stryker 1998, ongoing wholly-owned subsidiary, ticker SYK
Fluor Intercontinental Inc is SEC-confirmed wholly-owned subsidiary of Fluor Corporation, ticker FLR
Cintas Corporation No. 2 is SEC-confirmed subsidiary of Cintas Corporation, ticker CTAS
Teleflex Medical Incorporated per SEC subsidiary listing of Teleflex Incorporated, ticker TFX
Arrow International acquired by Teleflex 2007 ($2B), still subsidiary, ticker TFX
SPX Aids to Navigation OY is a current subsidiary of SPX Technologies, ticker SPXC
SPTS Technologies part of KLA Corporation via 2019 Orbotech acquisition, ticker KLAC
Aesynt was sold by McKesson to Francisco Partners in 2013; no longer a McKesson subsidiary — stale SAM.gov parent
Linde Gas & Equipment Inc is a Linde plc (LIN) operating subsidiary
Peraton is privately owned by Veritas Capital, not ITT; ITT connection is historical lineage only — stale SAM.gov parent
Sony Biotechnology is wholly-owned via Sony Corporation of America chain, Sony Group Corp ADR ticker SONY
Messer was divested FROM Linde/Praxair to Messer Group/CVC in 2019 antitrust remedy; no longer Linde-owned — stale SAM.gov parent
Atmosphere Commercial Interiors sold by Target in 2015 to Omni Workspace; no longer a Target subsidiary — stale SAM.gov parent
Peraton is privately owned by Veritas Capital, not ITT (Harris govt-IT spinoff 2017); stale SAM.gov parent
BlackRock Industries LLC is an unrelated construction/engineering contractor; no corporate link to BlackRock Inc (BLK)
HEAT Software merged into Ivanti (private, Clearlake-owned) in 2017; no relationship to Fortive — false SAM.gov parent
